<!-- template:begin:dev -->
## 🛠️ Dev

Install [Go](https://go.dev/doc/install).
### Run linter and formatter

[golangci-lint](https://golangci-lint.run/docs/welcome/install/#local-installation) must be installed.

```
golangci-lint run
```
### Run test

```
go test -v ./... -race
```
<!-- template:end:dev -->
